title: dysoxylum seemannii
intro: Dysoxylum seemannii is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Philippine white cedar or white cedar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dysoxylum seemannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as salves and ointments.
